name: undercity
description: A browser-based crime MMO inspired by Torn. Build your criminal empire, commit crimes, train stats, and dominate the underground.

scripts.test: npm --prefix backend test && npm --prefix backend run test:integration
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.lint: npm --prefix backend run lint && npm --prefix frontend run lint
scripts.lint:fix: npm --prefix backend run lint:fix && npm --prefix frontend run lint:fix
